title: Fix 'Unauthorized: Only users can create songs' error on song upload

requirements.text: In backend/main.mo, remove all authorization and identity checks from the createSong update function. The function must accept calls from any caller including anonymous without throwing or returning any 'Unauthorized: Only users can create songs' (or equivalent) error. The PIN-protected frontend admin panel is the sole authentication gate — the backend must not enforce any caller identity restriction on createSong.

quotes: Unauthorized: Only users can create songs

acceptanceCriteria: The createSong function in backend/main.mo contains no caller identity check, no admin principal validation, and no 'Unauthorized' guard of any kind.
Calling createSong from an anonymous identity (as the frontend does) succeeds without error.
The error toast 'Unauthorized: Only users can create songs' no longer appears after clicking 'Upload Song' in the admin panel.
A song uploaded via the admin panel is persisted and returned by getAllSongs.

requirements.text: In backend/main.mo, also verify and remove all authorization and identity checks from the createPoetry and createDua update functions, ensuring they too accept calls from any caller including anonymous without throwing or returning any 'Unauthorized' error. All three create functions (createPoetry, createDua, createSong) must be fully open to anonymous callers.
acceptanceCriteria: createPoetry, createDua, and createSong all contain no caller identity or authorization checks.
Uploading Poetry, Dua, or Song content from the admin panel succeeds without any 'Unauthorized' error for all three content types.
All three create functions persist data that is subsequently returned by their respective getAllX query functions.

constraints: Do not add any new authorization mechanism to the backend — the PIN-protected frontend admin panel is the sole authentication gate.
Do not modify any immutable frontend paths listed in the system context.
Preserve all existing stable variable declarations and data — do not re-initialize or wipe stored content.
nonGoals: Adding backend role-based access control or admin identity management.
Changing the frontend admin PIN authentication flow.
Modifying any other backend functions beyond the create functions.
